reachability_artifacts: sworn verify command using config.json providers.<prefix>.base_url against a real local HTTP transport, recording output and exit code
opt-in live Ollama Cloud chat request for contracts C-02/C-04/C-05

effort_complexity.rationale: See spec.json; implementer must re-assess against live code before design review.

release_benefit: A SwornAgent operator can run the full accountable implement-verify loop on Ollama Cloud or a chosen local OpenAI-compatible server, while maintainers add endpoints as data and detect provider wire drift before it reaches production.

positive_scenarios: Configured local endpoint receives the expected OAI request through sworn verify.
Ollama Cloud receives its canonical credential over HTTPS.
negative_scenarios: Invalid or unknown provider config fails before dispatch.
Keyless local endpoints never receive an Authorization header.
Removed BASE_URL variables are warned about without their values and do not alter routing.
validation.benefit_hypothesis: One data-driven endpoint authority removes the provider-extension collision and makes local/cloud routing visible, configurable, and safe.

design_decisions.choice: Use an explicit declared endpoint table rather than init-time self-registration.
design_decisions.human_decision: Ratified through release goal and decomposition on 2026-07-14.
design_decisions.rationale: Provider data becomes additive while resolution remains inspectable and deterministic.

design_decisions.choice: Make ollama/ OAI-compatible everywhere and preserve native /api/chat as ollama-native/.
design_decisions.human_decision: Option A selected by repository owner on 2026-07-14.
design_decisions.rationale: One prefix has one meaning and the natural name becomes full-loop capable.

design_decisions.choice: Use config.json providers.<prefix>.base_url as the only endpoint override source.
design_decisions.human_decision: Providers object and removal of legacy environment overrides selected by repository owner on 2026-07-14.
design_decisions.rationale: Endpoint configuration is durable and provider-scoped without duplicating credentials or capabilities.
